LanguageData.GasToxic.label: toxic gas
LanguageData.GasToxic.description: This shell contains a potent, nerve agent, harmful to most complex forms of organic life.
LanguageData.GasRage.label: rage gas
LanguageData.GasRage.description: This shell contains a potent, specialized airborne agent that induces blind, uncontrollable rage.
LanguageData.GasTear.label: tear gas
LanguageData.GasTear.description: This shell contains a potent, specialized airborne agent that attacks the sensitive membranes of the eyes and nose, making it difficult to see or breathe.
LanguageData.GasFear.label: fear gas
LanguageData.GasFear.description: This shell contains a potent, specialized airborne agent that induces an extremely strong feeling of dread and terror.
LanguageData.GasSleep.label: sleeping gas
LanguageData.GasSleep.description: This shell contains a potent sedative, capable of quickly knocking unconscious anyone exposed to it.
LanguageData.GasAcid.label: acid
LanguageData.GasAcid.description: This shell contains an extremely strong acid, capable of quickly burning away flesh and metal alike.
LanguageData.AntiBug.label: Insecticide
LanguageData.AntiBug.description: This shell is filled with a special aerosol specially designed to kill insectoids.
